---
author: "IY"
title: "Volcano Plot"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r Libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggrepel)
```

```{r DAA Results}
daaResults = readRDS('../../datasets/fish_daa_results_df.rds')
```

```{r Volcano Plot}
volcano = ggplot(data = daaResults, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y = -log10(p_adjust)))+
  geom_point(colour = '#8E7CA6')+
  aes(alpha = 0.25)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = 'dashed', color = '#E07A9A')+
  ylim(NA,1.5)+
  theme(legend.position='none')
```
Pink line indicates significance (P = 0.05). No point has surpassed the significance threshold.

```{r Export}
ggsave('../../plots/archive/koVolcanoPlot.jpg',
       plot = volcano,
       height=8.5, width = 14)
```
